corrected_fields.summary: This Treasury Department landing page aggregates links to American Rescue Plan impact reports and program descriptions. Content includes summaries of workforce development initiatives, housing support, and broadband investments across state/local governments. No publication date or substantive research findings are present.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: No current market relevance. This is an administrative navigation hub for historical American Rescue Plan documentation, not a source of macro catalysts or market-moving information.
